subcodes.title: Kalimat-i-Maknunih (Hidden Words - Arabic)
subcodes.first_line: This is that which hath descended from the realm of glory, uttered by the tongue of power and might, and revealed unto the Prophets of old.
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ما نزل من جبروت العزه بلسان القدره و القوه علی النبیین من قبل و انا
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @fairmindedness; personal justice [insaf], @humility; meekness; lowliness, @human reality created in the image of God, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @God's love for His own Essence, @bringing oneself to account each day, @soul; spirit after death, @knowledge of self
